name: docs-drift-sweep
title: Documentation Drift Sweep
summary: Compare documentation with repository facts and repair only externally detected drift.

inputs.name: drift_command
inputs.description: Trusted command returning documentation drift status/evidence JSON.

schedule.rationale: Run before releases or after public API and behavior changes.

evidence.name: docs-diff
evidence.description: Machine-derived mismatches between docs and repository facts.

expected_artifacts.name: run-journal
expected_artifacts.description: Durable execution and effect audit trail.

safety.rationale: Repository facts remain authoritative and agent prose cannot declare the sweep complete.
safety.secrets: Exclude secret files and redact any sensitive command output.
